name: Pizza Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon until crisp in a skillet; then drain and crumble it.
2. Bake the pastry shell at 400°F for 5 minutes. Remove from the oven.
3. Cover the bottom of the pastry shell evenly with 1/3 cup cheese. Sprinkle with crumbled bacon, onion, and remaining 1/3 cup cheese.
4. Beat eggs and flour until smooth. Blend in milk, 1/2 cup tomato sauce, cheese, salt, basil, and oregano.
5. Pour the mixture into the pie shell. Bake at 400°F for 15 minutes. Reduce the oven temperature to 325°F and continue baking for 25 to 30 minutes, or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
6. Using a spoon, drizzle the remaining tomato sauce in a spoke design over the top of the pie. Let stand 10 minutes before cutting into wedges.
7. Garnish with parsley.
